description:
Introductions:
Elevate your outdoor experience and create cherished memories with our reliable and versatile party tent. This stylish gazebo is perfect for weddings, BBQs, parties, and more. Designed with convenience and durability in mind, it provides a comfortable and enjoyable space for you and your guests. Made with sturdy iron tube and PE cloth, Our outdoor party tent offers shelter from the sun rays and light rain. Get ready to create unforgettable memories under the shelter of this easy-to-assemble party tent.

Features:
1. Easy Assembly: Our party tent is easy to set up with clear instructions and no need for extra tools. Invite a friend to help you keep the frame steady while you assemble the steel tubes and covers.
2. Spacious and Versatile: The tent measures 10'x10', offering the perfect setting for your outdoor activities. The four adjustable gears on each tube allow you to customize the tightness of the top cloth, ensuring maximum comfort and convenience.
3. High Quality: Our party tent is built to last. The rust and corrosion-resistant powder-coated steel framework, coupled with durable steel tubes and threaded pipe connection, makes our frame exceptionally sturdy and reliable. We also provide ropes and stakes for added stability.
4. Endless Outdoor Possibilities: Perfect for commercial or recreational use, such as wedding, party, meeting, camping, graduation, outdoor events, flea market, sport events and so on. And you can also use the wedding tent for backyard barbecue with your friends. The possibilities are endless.
5. ATTENTION: Do not use the tent in windy or rainy days. Please use ropes and ground stakes to secure the tent.

Specifications:
1. Material: Iron Tube & PE Cloth
2. Color: Black
3. Dimensions: (10 x 10 x 8.5)" / (300 x 300 x 260)cm (L x W x H)
4. Weight: 19.8 lb / 9 kg
5. Waterproof: Yes
6. Suitable for: Household, Wedding, Party, Parking Shed, etc.

Package Includes:
1 x Party Tent
